days.title: Arrival in Bali
days.subtitle: Beach vibes and first impressions

timeline.title: Arrive at Ngurah Rai International Airport
timeline.detail: Clearing customs and picking up luggage after your flight from Singapore. Grab a local SIM card to stay connected during your trip.
timeline.mapQuery: Ngurah Rai International Airport, Bali, Indonesia

timeline.title: Transfer to Kuta Beach
timeline.detail: Enjoy a 30-minute drive to Kuta Beach. This vibrant area is known for its lively atmosphere and beautiful sunsets over the ocean.

timeline.title: Check in to Hard Rock Hotel Bali
timeline.detail: Settle into your hotel just steps from Kuta Beach. Enjoy the resort's amenities such as pools and bars for relaxation.
timeline.mapQuery: Hard Rock Hotel Bali, Kuta, Bali, Indonesia

timeline.title: Lunch at Warung Sopa
timeline.detail: Indulge in Indonesian cuisine at this cozy Warung known for its vegetarian-friendly dishes and relaxed atmosphere. The tempeh burger is a must-try!

timeline.title: Relax at Kuta Beach
timeline.detail: Spend the afternoon soaking up the sun at Kuta Beach. Swim, sunbathe, or try surfing the gentle waves at this popular beach.

timeline.title: Dinner at La Plancha
timeline.detail: Dine at this iconic beach bar famous for its colorful bean bags and stunning sunset views. Enjoy local seafood while watching the sun sink below the horizon.

localTips: Buy a local SIM card at the airport for better connectivity.
Be cautious of street vendors; negotiate before purchasing.
Exchange your currency at authorized exchange counters for better rates.

days.title: Exploring Ubud
days.subtitle: Culture and nature in the heart of Bali

timeline.title: Breakfast at Hotel
timeline.detail: Enjoy a hearty breakfast buffet at the hotel to fuel up for a day of exploration. Try local fruits and pastries from the selection.
timeline.mapQuery: Hard Rock Hotel Bali, Kuta, Bali, Indonesia

timeline.title: Transfer to Ubud
timeline.detail: Take a scenic drive to Ubud, renowned for its rice terraces and art scene, about 1-hour drive from Kuta.

timeline.title: Visit Tegalalang Rice Terrace
timeline.detail: Explore the iconic Tegalalang Rice Terrace, where you'll experience stunning views of the vibrant green fields and learn about local farming practices.
timeline.mapQuery: Tegalalang Rice Terrace, Ubud, Bali, Indonesia

timeline.title: Lunch at Café Pomegranate
timeline.detail: Enjoy a leisurely lunch overlooking the rice paddies. Their organic dishes highlight fresh ingredients, and the smoothie bowls are highly recommended.

timeline.title: Visit Ubud Monkey Forest
timeline.detail: Walk through the sacred Ubud Monkey Forest, where you can see long-tailed macaques in their natural habitat and soak in the spiritual atmosphere.
timeline.mapQuery: Ubud Monkey Forest, Ubud, Bali, Indonesia

timeline.title: Dinner at Locavore
timeline.detail: Experience modern Indonesian dishes at this acclaimed restaurant known for its creative tasting menus. Reviews speak of their exceptional service.

localTips: Wear comfortable shoes, as the rice terrace paths can be uneven.
Keep your belongings secure at the Monkey Forest to avoid theft.
Try to engage with local artisans when you visit Ubud; they appreciate the interest.

days.title: Beach Day in Seminyak
days.subtitle: Sandy shores and vibrant nightlife

timeline.title: Breakfast at Hotel
timeline.detail: Savor another delicious breakfast at the hotel, making sure to try the Balinese specialties.
timeline.mapQuery: Hard Rock Hotel Bali, Kuta, Bali, Indonesia

timeline.title: Transfer to Seminyak Beach
timeline.detail: Enjoy a short drive to Seminyak, known for its upscale beach clubs and shopping opportunities.

timeline.title: Relax at Potato Head Beach Club
timeline.detail: Spend your day lounging at one of the most famous beach clubs in Bali. Enjoy great service, delicious food, and a stunning ocean view.
timeline.mapQuery: Potato Head Beach Club, Seminyak, Bali, Indonesia

timeline.title: Lunch at Beach Club
timeline.detail: Grab a light lunch at the beach club, focusing on fresh seafood and colorful cocktails to complement your beach vibe.
timeline.mapQuery: Potato Head Beach Club, Seminyak, Bali, Indonesia

timeline.title: Watch Sunset at Seminyak Beach
timeline.detail: Find a cozy spot to watch the beautiful sunset at Seminyak Beach, capturing stunning moments with your camera or phone.

timeline.title: Dinner at Bambu Restaurant
timeline.detail: Enjoy an elegant dinner at this refined restaurant specializing in traditional Indonesian cuisine. Try the Bali spice duck, a local favorite.

localTips: Book a beach bed in advance at Potato Head Beach Club to secure your spot.
Bring sunscreen and stay hydrated, especially during beach days.
Explore the local boutiques in Seminyak for unique finds.

hotels.name: Hard Rock Hotel Bali
hotels.note: Located close to Kuta Beach, a family-friendly resort.
hotels.address: Jalan Pantai Kuta, Kuta, Bali, Indonesia

budget.note: Return flights from Singapore to Bali
Cost for 2 nights at Hard Rock Hotel Bali
Budgeting for meals and drinks for two travelers.
Estimate for transportation to Ubud and back.
Entry and minimal spend at Potato Head Beach Club.
Entry fees for Monkey Forest and other activities.
Souvenirs and small expenses during the trip.
Local SIM card for mobile internet access.

urgent.label: Book Dinner at Locavore
urgent.note: This restaurant is very popular and often fully booked.

urgent.label: Reserve a Beach Club Bed
urgent.note: Ensure you have a beach bed reserved in advance at Potato Head.
